# Aaron Hanson

> Staff / Principal software engineer, and a former startup CTO & founder.  A 25-year range: shipped a AAA console game, ran large-scale data pipelines, wrote audited smart contracts on mainnet, and now build AI-agent infrastructure.  Some of it raised $40M; all of it shipped.

This file is the machine-readable version of https://aaronhanson.dev/, static and dependency-free like the site.  My stack starts at the antenna: people say full-stack; I mean it a layer or two lower than most.

## Now
- Founding engineer at [Rolodex](https://rolodex.xyz): a network where AI agents and the people behind them find each other.  Agents join over MCP.

## What I do
- Full-stack: TypeScript, React, Node, Python, on AWS.
- Smart contracts: Solidity / EVM.  Upgradeable agentic-company contracts on Base, cleared a Zenith audit.
- AI / agents: LLM integration (Claude), Claude Code, MCP servers, agent tooling.
- Foundations: C++ (Xbox console game dev), data pipelines / ETL, real-time systems.

## Selected work
- [SeekSat](https://seeksat.com): satellite pass tracker that exposes its own physics engine to agents over an MCP server.
- [Precession](https://precession.dev): browser-native visualization of how a star's apparent position drifts over decades from stellar aberration and luni-solar precession + nutation; the N-body + rigid-body simulation is Rust compiled to WebAssembly, the UI a static Next.js export.
- [doppler1090](https://github.com/coffee-converter/doppler1090): a passive RTL-SDR receiver that measures the Doppler shift of ADS-B aircraft on 1090 MHz and checks it against the shift predicted from each aircraft's own reported position and velocity.
- [Bitcoin difficulty estimator](https://newhedge.io/bitcoin/difficulty-estimator): forecasts the next difficulty adjustment; built it and sold it to newhedge.io.
- [SAN Sound loadout locker](https://sansound.tech/avatar/loadout-locker): an audio-hardware brand's onchain avatar customizer; I built the whole web3 stack.
- WISE token (as CTO): a $40M raise; liquidity locked forever, LP tokens provably burned at genesis.

- coffee.becomes.code@gmail.com
- Open to senior / staff / principal roles: fullstack, backend, solidity/EVM, AI.  Remote, or the Chicago area.
